violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025
The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was Correct By: 07/01/2025

Milk was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed milk in walk-in cooler. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC placed a work order prior to inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025
Utensils (stirring spoons) were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

Single service items were observed stored on the floor in the storage area. Single service/use items must be stored at least 6 inches off the floor. PIC relocated item. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025
Walk-in freezer was not in good repair (thick ice buildup around compressor and on floor under compressor). PIC placed a work order prior to inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves under donut stations and sandwich/beverage stations have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

The floors throughout the facility (including behind equipment) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025
